subject: [DCAEGEN2][dashboard] Use common secret template for postgres credentials
commit_message:
[DCAEGEN2][dashboard] Use common secret template for postgres credentials

Even through we use common secret template both passwords are still
hardcoded in common postgres chart but this will be removed as a final
step just like we did for mariadb-galera.

Issue-ID: OOM-2250
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Opasiak <k.opasiak@samsung.com>
Change-Id: Ic8d8a53093ccdf5f91a26ce9ac2734fe36ccca4f

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Seeing 500 status responses from Cloudify Manager during deployment of service components. We've seen these before in the gating environment, but not consistently.  
Almost certainly not related to the dashboard postgres password change, so +1.
Change has been successfully merged by Sylvain Desbureaux
